name: Carachuri-Rosendo v. Holder
question: Has a person convicted under state law for simple drug possession been "convicted" of an "aggravated felony" on the theory that he could have been prosecuted as a recidivist, even though there was no charge or finding of a prior conviction in his prosecution for possession?
description: A case in which the Court held that a minor drug offense is not automatic grounds for deportation of a legal immigrant.
